## Monk vs Ninjas

[Link](github...)

* Most complex project I've created
* The vision/idea:
    * Restoring balance
    * Emergent gameplay (Bob Dylan character)
    * Cyclical gameplay (dragon)
* Art from [DeLon Warren](https://www.delonwarren.com/)
    * Share gifs
* How it turned out:
    * Simple gameplay
    * Difficulty with camera
    * Very basic AI—followed the objective in a straight line
